channel.title: Researches on A minimal Hugo website
channel.description: Recent content in Researches on A minimal Hugo website

item.description:
Research

Aging and Longevity

For a past few months, I have been working alongside Dr. Olenik and Dr. Dönertas on a project that aims to understand the stochastic nature of aging.

Chronological age is the time elapsed since birth, whereas ageing refers to the gradual decline in biological function that leads to an increased risk of death or disease. Measuring the state of ageing of an individual (i.e., their “biological age”) is a crucial step toward understanding and addressing age-related diseases and extending lifespans. We model this with what is called an “aging clock”.
